_readme: Copy this file, rename it to your-institution-slug.json, fill in the fields, and delete all '_comment' keys. The file will auto-render on the education page sorted by start date (most recent first).
_comment_id: Unique kebab-case slug. Must match the filename (minus .json). Keep it short and stable e.g. 'mit', 'stanford', 'iit-bombay'.
_comment_degree: Full degree name exactly as it appears on your transcript / certificate.
_comment_institution: Official name. Parentheticals are fine e.g. 'Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC)'.
_comment_location: Human-readable location shown under the institution name.
_comment_duration:
Format: 'Mon YYYY - Mon YYYY'. Used both for display and for sorting (most recent start date first).
  Month abbreviations: Jan Feb Mar Apr May Jun Jul Aug Sep Oct Nov Dec
_comment_link: Official university / institution website. Opens in a new tab via the external-link icon on the card.
_comment_image: Path relative to the public/ folder. Add the image file to public/images/education/. Recommended size: landscape, at least 800×400px. Supports .png, .jpg, .webp.
_comment_coursework: Relevant courses shown in the terminal-style block on the card. 3-6 items recommended.
_comment_skills: Short skill tags you gained from this program. Not currently rendered on the card but available for future use.
